name: Blackberry Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
2. Stir in the strawberry preserves, coconut, nuts, and milk until just combined.
3. Fold in the muffin mix until evenly distributed.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch cake pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
